pairs.question: Who is Amirudin bin Shari and what political roles has he held?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari is a Malaysian politician born on 8 February 1980. He has served as the 16th Menteri Besar of Selangor since June 2018, a Member of the Selangor State Legislative Assembly (MLA) for Sungai Tua since May 2018, and a Member of Parliament (MP) for Gombak since November 2022. Previously, he was the MLA for Batu Caves from March 2008 to May 2018 and a member of the Selangor State Executive Council (EXCO) from September 2014 to June 2018.

pairs.question: Which political parties has Amirudin bin Shari been affiliated with, and what leadership roles has he held in these parties?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari is a member of the People's Justice Party (PKR), a component of the Pakatan Rakyat (PR) and Pakatan Harapan (PH) coalitions. He has served as the vice-president of PKR since July 2022 and as the State Chairman of PH in Selangor since March 2020. Additionally, he held the position of State Chairman of PH in Pahang from September 2022 to August 2024.

pairs.question: What were Amirudin bin Shari's contributions to the Selangor F.C. football team?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari served as the manager of the Selangor F.C. football team, leading the team to two consecutive Malaysia Cup finals in 2015 and 2016. Under his management, Selangor won the Malaysia Cup in 2015, ending a 33-year wait for the title. He also led the team to victory in the 2016 Sukma championship.

pairs.question: What were some of Amirudin bin Shari's early involvements in social activism and politics?
pairs.answer: During his early political career, Amirudin bin Shari campaigned on democracy, cultural, and student matters. He frequently held open discussion sessions with Komuniti Seni Jalan Telawi (KSJT) to promote arts and culture.

pairs.question: When did Amirudin bin Shari become the Menteri Besar of Selangor, and who did he succeed?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari became the Menteri Besar of Selangor in June 2018, succeeding Mohamed Azmin Ali, under whom he served as a member of the Selangor State Executive Council (EXCO) from September 2014 to June 2018.

pairs.question: What is the significance of Amirudin bin Shari's role in the 2015 Malaysia Cup victory?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari's leadership as manager of Selangor F.C. was pivotal in securing the 2015 Malaysia Cup victory, which ended a 33-year drought for the team. This achievement marked a significant milestone in Selangor's football history.

pairs.question: How did Amirudin bin Shari contribute to promoting arts and culture in Malaysia?
pairs.answer: Amirudin bin Shari organized and participated in open discussion sessions with Komuniti Seni Jalan Telawi (KSJT), a community group, to promote arts and culture as part of his early social activism efforts.
